name: Rahul Verma
email_subject: Paid Collab Opportunity for @rahulstrength 🎯
email_body:
Hi Rahul,

I came across your YouTube profile @rahulstrength and was genuinely impressed by your Strength Training content — especially your recent post on "Beginner deadlift tutorial". Your good engagement rate of 5.79% speaks volumes about the trust your 78.0K followers place in you.

We're FitFuel India, a homegrown Indian sports nutrition & fitness gear brand. We'd love to explore a paid sponsorship collaboration with you — featuring our product in your informative, science-backed strength content. The campaign would include a dedicated reel + 2 story frames with tracked affiliate link.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week?

Warm regards,
Ayesha Kapoor
FitFuel India | Influencer Partnerships
dm_message: Hey Rahul! 👋 Loved your post on "Beginner deadlift tutorial". We'd love to collab with FitFuel India — paid campaign, full creative freedom. DM or email us? 🙌
